infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sphaer uses your location to show events happening near you when you tap "Near me" on the feed. Your coordinates stay on your device and are never uploaded.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Sphaer accesses your photo library so you can upload posters for events and images for your profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Sphaer can save tickets and posters back to your photo library so you have them offline.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Sphaer uses the camera so you can take photos for your profile or scan event QR codes.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Sphaer sends notifications about new messages, follows, event reminders, and activity from circles you follow. You can control these from in-app settings.

plugins.photosPermission: Sphaer accesses your photo library so you can upload posters for events and images for your profile.
plugins.cameraPermission: Sphaer uses the camera so you can take photos for your profile or scan event QR codes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Sphaer uses your location to show events happening near you when you tap "Near me" on the feed.
